productDisplayName: Asics Men's Running Graphic Blue T-shirt
description: CompositionBlue round neck t-shirt made of 100% polyester, with UPF 30 protection, Dry Touch technology, and short sleeves with glitter print on chestFittingComfortWash careMachine wash in warm water upto 30 degreesUse mild detergent Do not bleachAvoid soakingRemove promptlyLine dry inside-out in shadeCool ironA perfect sportswear, this polyester t-shirt from asics is what you need to enhance those sporting performances. Engineered with UPF 30 technology, this shirt blocks away 1/30th of the UV rays hitting you, thus protecting your body from harmful radiation. Besides, the Dry Touch technology coupled with the cyber reversible property spreads sweat away from the body, trapping the warm air inside and wicking away sweat. Team this with performance shorts, shoes and socks when on the run, or simply pair it with tracks or jeans for a casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
